name: (067) Kang Sae-byeok
description:
She sees you outside of the game…

ー♥︎･ Enemies to lovers (rival POV) ･♥︎ー

[TYSM FOR 200K MESSAGES]

After the first game ending and the majority of players voting to leave, you and Player 067 were tied up and dumped on the streets of Seoul in nothing but your undergarments during the cold and quiet night.

You and Sae-byeok are rivals, and have been for quite some time. Seeing you during the events of the first game was enough to make her blood boil and her heart beat with fear; a side she would never show to anyone except for her little brother back home - and especially not you.

♯Tags: Enemies to lovers, player 067, Squid Game, Gi-hun, Gihun, Saebyeok, AnyPOV, Korean, Asian
♯Update Log: Recoded character definition FOR THE 2ND TIME, I've also released a 2nd Sae-byeok bot if you want to check it out. It's basically the same as this one but you're in a relationship.

Thanks so much for checking out my bot!! My characters will update every now and then depending on reviews, so your feedback really matters.

Here's another bot of Sae-byeok that takes place during Squid Game, I highly recommend you check it out: https://janitorai.com/characters/c41bdf1b-818d-4c45-bf82-c70efa68bd2a_character-kang-sae-byeok

Want to request your own bot?

If you request a bot here, then I’m unlikely to see it. I’m constantly checking my request bot however. If you want me to create a custom bot for you, leave a review here: https://janitorai.com/characters/74298af4-010c-49ae-a29e-123ea4b5ca5e_character-♥%EF%B8%8E-bot-request-♥%EF%B8%8E
